name: Backrooms: 5 Missing Wanderers
short_description: Backrooms: 5 Missing Wanderers is a liminal-spaced horror game which is inspired by the backrooms. The player has to solve puzzles and find the exit.
detailed_description: Backrooms: 5 Missing Wanderers is a backrooms single player game where you, a MEG employee, have been sent on a mission to find 5 wanderers lost in the depths of the backrooms. You must explore 4 different levels to traverse through in an attempt to rescue the 5 wanderers, these levels are huge, high-quality, and are sure to make your spine chill and your body to be on edge.
about_the_game: Backrooms: 5 Missing Wanderers is a backrooms single player game where you, a MEG employee, have been sent on a mission to find 5 wanderers lost in the depths of the backrooms.
